essence: Pilots unmanned aerial systems for inspection, surveying, media, and delivery tasks, following regulations and safety procedures.

identity.title: Drone Operator
identity.summary: Plans flights, operates drones for data capture or delivery, processes basic imagery, and ensures compliance with aviation rules.

salary.notes: Specialist roles (e.g., BVLOS, surveying) and commercial pilots can earn more.

qualifications: Experience flying multirotor and fixed‑wing drones
Knowledge of airspace rules and safety planning
Basic photogrammetry and image processing skills

lifestyle.description: Fieldwork heavy with outdoor operations, pre‑flight planning, and post‑processing. Work can be project‑based and seasonal.

habits: Plans safe flight paths and risk assessments
Operates drones and captures imagery or sensor data
Performs routine maintenance and battery management
Processes and hands off data to analysts or clients
